headline: 3 Stocks Estimated To Be Trading Up To 44.8% Below Intrinsic Value
summary: The United States market has shown robust performance, climbing 1.2% in the last week and 29% over the past year, with earnings projected to grow by 17% annually. In such an environment, identifying stocks that are trading below their intrinsic value can present opportunities for investors seeking potential growth at a reasonable price.

headline: SCHD’s Dividend Quality Filter Now Concentrates 42 Percent of Your Money in Just Ten Stocks
summary: Most investors buy Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHD) because the fund’s reputation tells them they are buying diversification. SCHD has 105 holdings, screens hard on dividend quality, and charges 0.06%. The retiree who built an income sleeve around SCHD usually has not read the holdings list. Read the list and the diversification story bends: ... SCHD’s Dividend Quality Filter Now Concentrates 42 Percent of Your Money in Just Ten Stocks

headline: Zifo, Pistoia Alliance, and Pharma Majors Launch Global IVP Assay Repository
summary: Zifo, the leading global enabler of AI and data-driven enterprise informatics for science-driven organizations, is proud to announce the successful development and launch of the In Vitro Pharmacology (IVP) Assay Repository, marking an important step toward standardizing how biological assays are captured, shared, and reused across the life sciences industry.

headline: GE Vernova, Estée Lauder, A Health Care Stock And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: GE Vernova fell 0.5% to settle at $1,038.74 during the Friday session while AbbVie shares gained 0.6% to close at $215.70 on Friday.
